description:
## What
Implement the Mastodon Lists feature: named groups of followed accounts with a dedicated filtered timeline and configurable replies_policy.

## Why
Users want to organize their follows into topic-based groups and read focused timelines without noise from their full home feed.

## Scope
- DB schema: lists and list_accounts tables
- CRUD endpoints for lists (/api/v1/lists)
- Account membership endpoints (/api/v1/lists/:id/accounts)
- List timeline endpoint (/api/v1/timelines/list/:id)
- replies_policy enforcement
- 50 lists per persona limit
title: Lists (custom account groupings with timeline)
